full_text:
Wang Huiyang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Huiyangwas born in Dongping. Of leading local family and close friend to poor Huang Lang. Treated Lang’s mother like his own. Wang Huiyang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
